"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}], "description": "### Impact
An attacker who can MITM the TLS connection between the client and the IDP (within the TI network) can substitute a forged discovery document. The forged document redirects u ri_puk_idp_enc and uri_puk_idp_sig to attacker-controlled URLs. The client then encrypts the SMC-B-signed challenge response to the attacker's encryption key and POSTs it to the attacker's auth endpoint. This captures the signed authentication material.

### Patches
[#36](https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/pull/36)

### Workarounds
None.

### Resources
- MS-OVIVA-EPA4ALL-d453c1

### Credits
[Machine Spirits](https://machinespirits.com/) ([contact@machinespirits.de](mailto:contact@machinespirits.de))

- Dr. rer. nat. Simon Weber
- Dipl.-Inf. Volker Schönefeld
- Chiara Fliegner", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00118, "percentile": 0.0199}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T18:30:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45575"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-26T21:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T18:30:48Z", "references": ["https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/security/advisories/GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/pull/36", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/commit/9111d6fbb939007036a7f74b2a93bb278cb5af32", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/releases/tag/v1.2.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45575", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/security-advisories/GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client", "summary": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature in com.oviva.telematik:epa4all-client", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:31:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gqx7-6552-67hf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.oviva.telematik:epa4all-client"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
